questions.question: Which span name represents an agent run in the GenAI conventions?
questions.explanation: invoke_agent is the canonical name; the agent's name attribute appears in the span name when set.

questions.question: Which three span categories does the GenAI SIG define?
questions.explanation: Model/client (LLM calls), agent (create/invoke), tool (per invocation) are the categories.

questions.question: When does an invoke_agent span use kind CLIENT vs INTERNAL?
options: CLIENT for remote agent services (OpenAI Assistants, Bedrock Agents); INTERNAL for in-process frameworks (LangChain, CrewAI, local ReAct)
questions.explanation: Remote agent calls are CLIENT; in-process agent runs are INTERNAL.

questions.question: What is the default rule for content capture (inputs and outputs)?
options: Instrumentations SHOULD NOT capture by default; capture is opt-in via gen_ai.* attributes
questions.explanation: Default-off content capture protects PII and secrets; opt-in is explicit.

questions.question: Which attribute identifies the corpus or store consulted for a retrieval?
questions.explanation: gen_ai.data_source.id 标注了被检索命中的 RAG 语料库或存储。

questions.question: 该课(Lesson)推荐在生产环境中如何存储提示词内容？
options: 在每个 span 上以纯文本形式捕获完整提示词
将内容存储在外部（S3、日志存储）并在 span 上记录引用 ID 代替
在 span 属性中加密提示词
questions.explanation: 使用指针 ID 的外部存储可避免 PII 泄漏到运维可读的追踪(traces)中。

questions.question: 如何选用 GenAI 约定的实验性稳定预览版？
options: 编辑 OTel collector 配置
questions.explanation: 该环境变量锁定实验性约定，从而避免属性被静默重命名。
